items.line_en: Welcome to learn with cartoon videos.

items.line_en: Improve your English conversation while buying shoes.

coach.say: Improve your English conversation while buying shoes.

items.line_en: Sir, how may I help you?

coach.say: Sir, how may I help you?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sir, / how may I help you?

items.line_en: I'm looking for a pair of leather shoes.

coach.say: I'm looking for a pair of leather shoes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm looking for a pair of leather shoes.

items.line_en: What size do you wear?

coach.say: What size do you wear?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What size do you wear?
Chunk it: 7.
Chunk it: 7.

items.line_en: For which brand?

coach.say: For which brand?
coach.hint: Chunk it: For which brand?

items.line_en: Does the same size mean different thing for different brands?

coach.say: Does the same size mean different thing for different brands?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Does the same size mean different thing for different brands?

items.line_en: It should be standard across all brands, right?

coach.say: It should be standard across all brands, right?
coach.hint: Chunk it: It should be standard across all brands, / right?

items.line_en: For few brands, the same size can mean slightly different fitting.

coach.say: For few brands, the same size can mean slightly different fitting.
coach.hint: Chunk it: For few brands, / the same size can mean slightly different fitting.

items.line_en: It?

coach.say: It?
coach.hint: Chunk it: It?

items.line_en: I thought otherwise.

coach.say: I thought otherwise.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I thought otherwise.

items.line_en: Anyway, I wear signs to seven of hush puppies, and because I want to buy the same brand it shouldn't be a problem.

coach.say: Anyway, I wear signs to seven of hush puppies, and because I want to buy the same brand it shouldn't be a problem.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Anyway, / I wear signs to seven of hush puppies, / and because I want to buy the same brand it shouldn't be a problem.

coach.say: Yes, it won't be a problem in your case.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / it won't be a problem in your case.

items.line_en: This section has new arrivals and this has shoes on sale.

coach.say: This section has new arrivals and this has shoes on sale.
coach.hint: Chunk it: This section has new arrivals and / this has shoes on sale.

items.line_en: The variety is far less here, because I'm buying shoes for at least few years, I would like to buy something I like.

coach.say: The variety is far less here, because I'm buying shoes for at least few years, I would like to buy something I like.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The variety is far less here, / because I'm buying shoes for at least few years, / I would like to buy something I like.

items.line_en: I'll prefer new arrivals.

coach.hint: Chunk it: I'll prefer new arrivals.

coach.say: Most of the shoes on sale were picked up by customers within a day of opening of the sale.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Most of the shoes on sale were picked up by customers within a day of opening of the sale.

items.line_en: That's why you find far less variety there.

coach.hint: Chunk it: That's why you find far less variety there.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Why don't you try these ones?

coach.hint: Chunk it: Not these ones.

coach.hint: Chunk it: I'm looking for more formal look, / the ones with laces and predominantly plain texture.

items.line_en: I like this one.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Let me try it.

coach.hint: Chunk it: This fits well.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Size 7.
